div.title: Python is a dynamically typed programming language.
JavaScript (JS) is a lightweight interpreted programming language with first-class functions.
Java is an object-oriented programming language used mainly for web, desktop, embedded devices and mobile applications.
Android is an operating system built by Google designed for mobile devices.
Linux is an open source kernel.
HTML is the fundamental markup language for webpages.
React is an open source JavaScript library used for designing user interfaces.
An awesome list is a list of awesome things curated by the community.
Node.js is a tool for executing JavaScript in a variety of environments.
A CLI, or command-line interface, is a console that helps users issue commands to a program.
TypeScript is a typed superset of JavaScript that compiles to plain JavaScript.
Bash is a shell and command language interpreter for the GNU operating system.
The terminal is an interface in which you can type and execute text-based commands.
Rust is a systems programming language created by Mozilla.
React Native is a JavaScript mobile framework developed by Facebook.
Ubuntu, Security, npm, Windows, Kotlin, Telegram, Swift, Xamarin, Reverse Engineering, Termux, telegram-userbot, userbot-telegram

section.div: Open-source, self-hosted note-taking tool built for quick capture. Markdown-native, lightweight, and fully yours.
Flyline: a Bash plugin to replace readline for a modern line editing experience: syntax highlighting, agent integration, rich prompts, tooltips, fuzzy history search, and more!
